beats.purpose: Present Borealis as the MEZO Utilization product, not a production note.
beats.visual: AI cold-open liquidity shot for 4 seconds, then pitch-facing Borealis capital-router copy and allocator motion.

beats.purpose: Explain why Mezo capital needs transparent allocation infrastructure.
beats.visual: Capital-routing console shows MEZO, MUSD, BTC, and proof as disconnected jobs.

beats.purpose: Define the product as governance becoming capital operations.
beats.visual: Capital-routing console and AI gauge transition bridge into the demo.

beats.purpose: Walk through the product as an operator workflow: enter the router, allocate MUSD, execute, and verify.
Position proof as a product feature, not a screenshot claim.
beats.visual: Network, AllocationUpdated event, receipts, and explorer proof animate as metric cards.

beats.purpose: Explain why the primitive matters after the hackathon.
beats.visual: MEZO and MUSD get repeatable ecosystem jobs; ask slide points to a pilot path.

beats.purpose: Ask for MEZO Utilization prize and technical continuation path.
beats.visual: Remotion ask slide, then AI ecosystem sting with Remotion-rendered Borealis lockup and public URL.

aiVideoInserts.role: Banger opening texture, not product evidence.
Capital-routing transition before the real app recording area.
Closing ecosystem texture behind the final Remotion text.
